Item: Header bar is always stuck to the top of the screen
Item_JP: Header barは常にscreenのtopに固定されている

Item: Navigation bar is always stuck to the bottom of the screen
Item_JP: Navigation barは常にscreenのbottomに固定されている

Item: When main content is longer than viewport, scrolling happens only to main content; header and nav bar stay fixed
Item_JP: Main contentがviewportより長い場合、scrollingはmain contentのみに発生し、header barとnavigation barは固定されたまま

Item: Header bar may display current view title
Item_JP: Header barは現在のview titleを表示する場合がある

Item: Header bar provides navigation to go back
Item_JP: Header barにback navigationが提供されている

Item: Navigation bar has 4 buttons: Carparks, Events, Weather, Setting
Item_JP: Navigation barに4つのbutton: Carparks, Events, Weather, Setting がある

Item: manifest.json is configured for mobile web app
Item_JP: manifest.jsonがmobile web app用にconfigureされている

Item: Essential meta tags configured for both Android and iOS
Item_JP: AndroidとiOS両方のessential meta tagsがconfigureされている

Item: Viewport configured for mobile web friendly viewing
Item_JP: Viewportがmobile web friendly viewingにconfigureされている

Item: Good Chrome Lighthouse accessibility score
Item_JP: Chrome Lighthouse accessibilityのscoreが良好

Item: Easy-to-maintain JavaScript code
Item_JP: メンテナンスしやすいJavaScript code

Item: Displays a list of carpark records with availability count
Item_JP: Carparkのrecord listがavailability count付きで表示される

Item: Toggle for switching between alphabet sorting and distance sorting
Item_JP: Alphabet sortingとdistance sortingを切り替えるtoggleがある

Item: Sorting toggle setting is inside the Setting view
Item_JP: Sorting toggleのsettingはSetting view内にある

Item: Geolocation can be manually set by URL query: ?latitude=45.755051&longitude=4.846358
Item_JP: GeolocationをURL queryで手動設定可能: ?latitude=45.755051&longitude=4.846358

Item: Mobile web requests current geolocation as default method
Item_JP: Mobile webがdefaultのmethodとしてcurrent geolocationをrequestする

Item: Source code implements geolocation even if browser blocks it
Item_JP: Browserがblockした場合でもgeolocationのsource code implementationがある

Item: User can click a carpark to focus on it
Item_JP: Userがcarparkをclickしてfocusできる

Item: Focused view displays only carpark name, distance, and availability number
Item_JP: Focused viewにcarpark name, distance, availability numberのみが表示される

Item: User can go back to carpark list from focused view
Item_JP: Focused viewからcarpark listにback navigationできる

Item: Carpark can be pinned to top of the list
Item_JP: Carparkをlistのtopにpinできる

Item: Carpark can be unpinned
Item_JP: Carparkをunpinできる

Item: Pinned carparks stay at top regardless of sorting method (alphabet or distance)
Item_JP: Pinされたcarparkはsortingのmethodにかかわらずtopに固定される

Item: Pinned status saved to local storage
Item_JP: Pin statusがlocal storageにsaveされる

Item: Pinned status restored on page refresh
Item_JP: Page refresh時にpin statusがrestoreされる

Item: Event list displays events from default API data
Item_JP: Event listがdefault APIデータからeventsを表示する

Item: Each event record shows image, event title, and event date
Item_JP: 各event recordにimage, event title, event dateが表示される

Item: Events listed from top to bottom
Item_JP: Eventsがtop to bottomでlistされる

Item: Event list can be filtered by beginning date
Item_JP: Beginning dateでevent listをfilterできる

Item: Event list can be filtered by ending date
Item_JP: Ending dateでevent listをfilterできる

Item: Input to select a beginning date and an input to select an ending date
Item_JP: Beginning dateを選択するinputとending dateを選択するinputがある

Item: Event list refreshes when date filter is applied
Item_JP: Date filterが適用されるとevent listがrefreshされる

Item: API called with beginning_date and ending_date query parameters
Item_JP: APIがbeginning_dateとending_dateのquery parameterで呼び出される

Item: Further event data loads when user scrolls to bottom
Item_JP: Userがbottomまでscrollするとさらにevent dataがloadされる

Item: Loading timing is well-tuned (not too late and not too early)
Item_JP: Loadingのtimingが適切（遅すぎず早すぎない）

Item: No duplicate records displayed
Item_JP: 重複recordが表示されない

Item: No missing records in the display
Item_JP: 表示されるrecordに欠落がない

Item: Scrolling feels smooth and not laggy
Item_JP: Scrollingがsmoothでlaggyでない

Item: Shows upcoming week weather (7 days)
Item_JP: Upcoming weekのweatherを表示（7 days）

Item: Week weather is aligned horizontally
Item_JP: Week weatherがhorizontallyにalignされている

Item: Weather snaps to the day when scrolling horizontally
Item_JP: Horizontal scrolling時にweatherがdayにsnapする

Item: SVG icons displayed for each day based on weather status
Item_JP: Weather statusに基づく各dayのSVG iconsが表示される

Item: SVG icons use data from responded JSON
Item_JP: SVG iconsがresponded JSONのdataを使用する

Item: SVG has animated stroke effect on mouse hover
Item_JP: Mouse hover時にSVGにanimated stroke effectがある

Item: SVG stroke color is #1c3e60, stroke width 1, fill none
Item_JP: SVGのstroke colorが#1c3e60, stroke width 1, fill none

Item: stroke-dasharray animation from 50 to 200 over 2 seconds
Item_JP: stroke-dasharray animationが2 secondsで50から200

Item: stroke-dashoffset animation from 200 to 0
Item_JP: stroke-dashoffset animationが200から0

Item: Theme switching between dark theme, light theme, and system setting
Item_JP: Dark theme, light theme, system settingの間でtheme switching

Item: Toggle for alphabet vs distance sorting of carparks
Item_JP: Carparkのalphabet vs distance sortingのtoggle

Item: Sorting toggle affects the carpark list view
Item_JP: Sorting toggleがcarpark list viewに影響する

Item: Mock API PHP file placed at wsXX.worldskills.org/module_d_api.php
Item_JP: Mock API PHP fileがwsXX.worldskills.org/module_d_api.phpに配置されている

Item: Carparks data from /module_d_api.php/carparks.json
Item_JP: Carparks dataを/module_d_api.php/carparks.jsonから取得

Item: Events data from /module_d_api.php/events.json
Item_JP: Events dataを/module_d_api.php/events.jsonから取得

Item: Weather data from /module_d_api.php/weather.json
Item_JP: Weather dataを/module_d_api.php/weather.jsonから取得

Item: Events API pagination uses pages.next and pages.prev structure
Item_JP: Events APIのpaginationがpages.nextとpages.prev structureを使用
